summary: Student learning portal with admin dashboard. Students can register and sign in via Internet Identity with no access code or payment gate. All registered students are visible in the admin dashboard with payment/active status. Admin can add sessions and materials for specific booked/enrolled students via dropdown menus.
architectural_notes: Student registration system remains unchanged; only sign-in flow is modified to remove payment/access-code gate
Student portal access is open to all registered users regardless of payment status; payment info is informational only in admin dashboard
known_issues: Active students were incorrectly blocked by payment pending message during sign-in

existing_features.title: Remove all payment gate and access code checks from the student sign-in flow. Any student who logs in via Internet Identity must be granted immediate access to the student portal regardless of payment status, active/pending/approved flag, or access code. The 'payment is still pending approval' block and any similar payment-based login interruption must be fully removed.
The admin dashboard Students section must display all registered students (regardless of payment status) with their payment and active status clearly shown for each student.

In the admin ManageStudentSessions page, the student selector dropdown must be populated with all students who have booked or registered for a session (enrolled/active students). The admin must be able to select any such student from the dropdown and add sessions specifically for that student. Currently there is no option to add a student even if they have booked — this must be fixed so enrolled/booked students always appear in the dropdown.

In the admin ManageStudentMaterials page, the student selector dropdown must be populated with all students who are enrolled or registered (same logic as sessions). The admin must be able to select any such student from the dropdown and add materials specifically for that student. This mirrors the sessions fix: enrolled students must always appear in the materials dropdown.

new_feature_requests.summary: Remove payment gate and access code from student sign-in — any student can log in via Internet Identity
Admin dashboard shows all registered students with payment/active status
Sessions section: booked/enrolled students appear in dropdown so admin can add sessions per student
Materials section: enrolled students appear in dropdown so admin can add materials per student

Update the backend actor to remove any payment status or access code validation that blocks student login or portal access. Student authentication via Internet Identity should only verify that the principal exists; no payment gate, approval status check, or access code check should prevent a logged-in student from accessing their data.
